tasks.title: Define Guardrail Constitutions
tasks.context_slice: Create system-template/config/constitutions/strict.md and lean.md. These files define the engineering culture injected into every agent prompt. 'strict' mandates TDD, zero placeholders, and strict typing. 'lean' biases for action and prototyping speed.

tasks.title: Implement Custom Skills (Kanban & Slicer)
tasks.context_slice: Create system-template/skills/kanban-manager.md and context-slicer.md. These are the Pi skills that teach the Planning agent how to break down requirements into tasks.json and how to extract only relevant constraints into the context_slice.

tasks.title: Implement Custom Skills (Role Recruiter)
tasks.context_slice: Create system-template/skills/role-recruiter.md. This Pi skill teaches the Planning agent how to evaluate if a task requires domain knowledge outside the core roster, and if so, how to write a new role to ./.agents/custom-roles/.
